tweets.full_text:
Contract deployers on Solana are up from ~300 on average last year to ~440 now.

That’s an average of 45–50% increase in builders actively shipping programs.

Contract deployers count unique accounts deploying code onchain.

This trend signals accelerating developer adoption and more apps coming.

TLDR: bullish af

tweets.full_text:
I understand the vibes are kinda low right now with everything that happened this past week, but I'd like to know what you guys are doing to stay safe.

- What are your new Solana DeFi strategies?
- Have you taken any new security measures for yourself?
- Do you have a diversified portfolio?
- Do you have a cold hardware wallet?
- If the exploit affected you, what steps are you putting in place to minimize losses if this eventually happens again?

My heart is with all those who were affected.

I LOVE YOU ALL

tweets.full_text:
DON'T HOLD $SOL ❌ 

Solana inflation is ~4.7% right now.
if your SOL is just sitting there, you're losing purchasing power every single epoch.

you have 3 moves:

liquid staking (LST)
> jitoSOL @jito_sol, mSOL @MarinadeFinance, INF @sanctumso, jupSOL..
> 6% to 8% APY
> stay liquid. use as collateral. deploy in DeFi
> INF has been the best performer. 9.62% avg APY in 2025

native staking 
> delegate to a validator directly
> 5.9% to 7.5% APY
> no smart contract risk
> 2-3 day unstaking cooldown

lending protocols
> deposit your LST into @kamino, @Loopscale, etc.
> stack yield/points on top of staking yield

unstaked SOL = guaranteed dilution. 

are you staking your SOL? 👇
tweets.name: inno

tweets.full_text:
🌟 Highlighted Notable Solana Projects in the Past Week 
🔸@GoDark is bringing private trading to Solana with a decentralized dark pool built for MEV protection and sub-second execution.
🔸@FlashTrade is turning Solana into a serious venue for onchain forex. With 2 bps fees and instant fills.
🔸@StraitsX plans to bring XSGD and XUSD to Solana, expanding access to Singapore dollar- and USD-backed stablecoins.
🔸@encrypt_xyz is building a privacy-first messaging layer where wallet identities power secure communication and key verification.
🔸@SuperstateInc is extending tokenized funds and public equities to SPL, connecting regulated assets with onchain markets.
🔸@ikadotxyz is introducing dWallets to enable bridgeless capital markets, letting assets from other networks move into Solana-native apps without wrappers.
🔸@cesto_co is launching a vibe investing platform that bundles tokenized stocks, crypto, yield, and prediction markets into one wallet-native flow.
🔸@magicblock is pushing high-performance SVM infrastructure for low-latency games and composable applications.
🔸@symbiosis_fi connects Solana to 20+ networks through its bridge and cross-chain routing infrastructure.
🔸@EatwithNomu is building a Solana-native e-commerce marketplace where users can pre-buy products and earn when they sell.
🔸@risedotrich is focused on high-speed onchain experiences and performance-first infrastructure for the ecosystem.
🔸@Evoracharge is developing practical blockchain rails with a focus on payments and real-world utility.
🔸@ellipsis_labs is advancing market-structure and trading infrastructure for the ecosystem.
🔸@clawpumptech is centered on token launches and community-driven trading activity.
🔸@surfcashx is working on crypto payment rails designed for easier everyday spending.
🔸@PodsFinance is building DeFi tooling around yields, strategies, and treasury management.
🔸@wormwtf is focused on interoperability and cross-chain asset movement.

Which Solana project impressed you the most last week? Shout it out! 👇

YouTube allows creators to receive stablecoin payouts through PayPal, and Gusto pays contractors same-day in any country via USDC. 

Both are made possible by stablecoins on Solana. 
                                      
How stablecoins are making global payouts faster, cheaper, and available 24/7: https://t.co/RAZq7iuDOX

every OG Solana trader knows @birdeye_so 🐦
building since 2021. 4 years later, still the standard.

> built by the former head of product at Solscan
> 300+ DEXes and AMMs integrated
> Solana native + 10 chains, millions of traders since 2022

what makes it the go-to:
> Trending: real-time data on new pairs, liquidity, holder distribution
> Smart Money: discover what high-PnL traders are trading
> Wallet Analyzer: full PnL breakdown on any Solana wallet
> Supercharts: from CEX to DEX, from liquidity to holders, 20 indicators in only one view
> combined alerts: volume spike + smart wallet buy + liquidity drop
> Insights: 20+ web3 sector dashboards (RWA, memecoins, LSD, DeFi)
> 20+ launchpads tracked in one place

before you ape anything on Solana, you check Birdeye first.
that's not a take. that's just how it works.

and this april, they're giving back.
free token page update for every Solana project. $200 waived.
april 30 is the cutoff.

tweets.full_text:
Weekly Update – @NOMADZxyz | Week 15 [2026]  

1.1 Quick wins: 
1. Built 10 new Essential badges and a new revenue share program 
2. Tested and fixed issues with aggregator v.2 
3. Shipped discount codes for Nomadz 100 and Accelerate
4. Had a launch campaign with @the_mindfolk and @cherrydotfun 
5. Crossed 17.6K registered users, with 150 DAU and 28.57% retention rate

1.2 What's next: 
1. Platform: launch referral program with tiers, add @superteam events to calendar, update payment flow to @moonpay, integrate a new auth system
2. Mobile: Launch v. 11 with new quests, badges and events 
3. Partnership campaign with a secret community (not signed yet)

2. Highlights  
2.1 Product - Platform 
1. Improved aggregator with v.2 is tested and issues are fixed
2. Discount codes for Nomadz 100, @SolanaEvents and @NFCsummit are shipped
3. 10 new Essential badges and a new revenue share program

2.2 Product - @solanamobile
  
1. Communities verification, new badges and quests, new events will be live this week

2.3 Growth
1. Launched podcasts with @theindexshow and @the_mindfolk 
2. Launched a campaign with @cherrydotfun and @perena 
 3. Sent the forth email campaign: 15,000 emails delivered. 
4. Crossed 17,600+ registered users and 20,000+ followers on X. 
5. Onboarded 19 new creators to Nomadz 100 and hosted second community call.

3. Lowlights  
1. On the final stage for signing major partnerships
2. Have not been able to secure more events partnerships

4. Core Metrics  
1. Total Users: 17,654 (↑ from 17,303 last week) 
2. Active Users (week): 1047 (↑ from 787 last week) 
3. New Users (week):  329 (↑ from 172 last week) 
4. DAU: ~149 on average (↑ from 113 last week) 
5. Transactions on Solana (week): ~2019 (↑ from 6420 last week) 
6. Retention: 28.57% (↑ from 28.02% last week)
6. X Followers (@NOMADZxyz): 20,005k+ (↑ from 19,915)  

5. This Week's Focus  
→ Launch discount codes for communities
→ Events calendar with Superteam events 
→ Launch Nomadz 100 Cohort 2 and have the second community call 
→ Sign new BIG partnership and do a launch campaign
 
 6. Asks  
1. Looking for companies actively traveling to help them save on hotels and provide concierge service  

7. Shoutouts 
Big thanks to the @solana team for providing fresh ideas and support to us. Also, for connecting with relevant people. Grateful for the hard work of my dev and growth teams despite. 

It was a hard, but productive week. We will ship more this week!
tweets.name: Ivan 🧳

You’re losing money every time you swap using wrong wallet

Same $10k swap: 👇

@Backpack (0%)
$10k → $0
$50k → $0
$100k → $0

@jup_mobile (~0.02%)
$10k → $2
$50k → $10
$100k → $20

@phantom (0.85%)
$10k → $85
$50k → $425
$100k → $850

@MetaMask (0.875%)

$50k → $437
$100k → $875

Just wallet fees
